title: Saksoft Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Saksoft Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Saksoft Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About Saksoft Global Group:
Saksoft Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft Global Group!
